name: tool-skills
description: Local CLI tool skills for Codex workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Skill routing notes for local CLI tools.
interface.longDescription: A personal local plugin for CLI-first tool workflows. Each bundled skill explains when to use a local command-line tool, how to verify it, and when to fall back to native Codex file and shell tools. Onesearch CLI is included as the local entry point for source-backed web research, docs lookup, page fetching, crawling, repo wiki, and MCP-compatible research commands.
defaultPrompt: Use the right local CLI tool skill for this task.
Use the tool-onesearch skill for source-backed web research through the local Onesearch CLI.
Use the tool-codesearch skill for natural-language codebase discovery.
Use the tool-officecli skill for Word, Excel, and PowerPoint document workflows.
Show me which CLI tool fits this request.
